ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "subject_no" TEXT /* Subject number of the course */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "ltp" TEXT /* Lecture-Tutorial-Practical (L-T-P) distribution */,
  "credit" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "subject_type" TEXT /* Type of the course (e.g., CORE, ELECTIVE) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor teaching the course */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the course is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "chair_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department chair */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_chair_id FOREIGN KEY ("chair_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who registered for the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student registered for */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the student registered (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the student registered */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received in the course */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., Registered, Dropped) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the registration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the registration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite relationship */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that has a prerequisite */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the prerequisite is mandatory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prerequisite relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prerequisite relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, faculty, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)
